title: Sketching Live
desc: Sketch on your browser and display it live on a physical TFT screen over USB!
fullDesc: Draw on a digital canvas and watch your art render live on a physical TFT LCD display! Paint Connect Studio Pro connects to your hardware over Web Serial, using custom Run-Length Encoding (RLE) to stream paint commands directly to an ESP32 or Arduino. Choose from various tools, shapes, colors, and line thicknesses.
components: Web Browser with Web Serial API support
author: Amogha
guide: Connect your microcontroller to the computer via USB
Open the Sketching Live app and click CONNECT
Use tools, colors, and shapes to sketch on the canvas
Watch your artwork sync live to the hardware display!
